steps.title: Identify roots from the factored form
Use the given point to set up an equation in t
steps.content: Since the graph passes through $(23,0)$ and $-17\ne 23$, the other zero must be $23$, so $t=23$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $391$; substituting or interpreting it in the original condition satisfies the requirement, so $391$ is the value to enter.
